name: M &m Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs, milk, and vanilla to the butter mixture. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, soda, cinnamon) to the wet ingredients. Mix until just combined.
4. Divide the batter evenly between two 9-inch cake pans that have been greased and floured.
5. Sprinkle half of the M&Ms on top of each pan's batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cakes to cool in their pans for 10 minutes before transferring them to wire racks to finish cooling.
